titleStmt.title: SII 37.432: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 432. (A.R. No. E 30 of 1941-42.) Guḍipūḍi, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District.

summary.p: Another pillar in the Bhīmēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1085, Uttarāyana, Samkrānti and may correspond to 1163 A.D.

It registers a gift of 55 sheep for the maintenance of a perpetual lamp to the god Bhīmēśvara at Mamaṁpūṇḍi by Pēramadēvi, the wife of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mummaḍi-Mandagerāju who bears a long string of epithets. He is said to have been born in the Phaṇīndra-kula and to have belonged to the Penugoṇḍānvaya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
9 svasti . yanēkakarimakara nikara parimita
paripū¨rnnatā¨rnnavaparīta bhūtalādhipati
lakṣmīsamāliṁggitōttuṁga viśāla vakṣastala
yakṣṇī varaprasāda sāmrājya bhūrībhāra
jagatīvallabha mahānṛpati nṛpaparamēśvarapa
rama bhaṭṭāraka yanēka samara saṁghaṭṭana vī
ra vijayalakṣmī lakṣita sahasra śirōmaṇi ki
raṇa nikara bhāsura phaṇīṁdra kulasaṁbhava
maṇi nāgapuravarēśvara karimakarōraga varā
ha lāṁcchana caturudadhivēlāvalaya vala
yita yayōdhya siṁhāsana lalāṭamakuṭa
paṭṭabaddha triśata yōjanīyōpātta gaṁggā
śasalilasnāna pavitrīkrikṛtōttamāṁgga maṇi kha
cita kanakadaṁḍadhavalachatratraya yuragapa
ra ghōṣaṇa yuragēṁdra lāṁcchana viṣṇuvaṁśō
dbhava penugoṁḍānvaya kulattilaka harīta
gōtra Āśritajanakalpa vrikṣaśaraṇāgata jīva
rakṣamahānadītaṭa nighāta pū¨rvvadigvija
ya śilātalastaṁbha yēkādaśāśvamēdhāva
bhritasnāna pavitrīkrita viṣṇukuṁ
ḍināṁ kulamalaṁkariṣṭināṁ Aṭāra hada
ṁti sahasrāṇi daśakōṭyaṁtu vājināṁ Ananta
pādasaṁghātamityētē mādhavava¨rmma pratāpu
laina śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara mummaḍi maṁda
gerājulaku lakṣmīsamānamaina pēramadē
vulu manmaṁpūṁḍi damatalliprōlamāṁbi
ka pratiṣṭiṁcina śrī bhīmēśvara mahādēvarakuṁ
damaku dha¨rmmāttamugā śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1085
gunēṁṭi Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtti nimittamu
na nakhaṁḍavatti dīpaṁbunakiccina goṟiya
lu 55 vīniṁjēkoni pērabōyuni koḍuku
vīrabōyuṁḍu dana putrānu pautrikamāca
ṁdrā¨rkkamu nityamāneṁḍu neyidīpaṁbuna
kuṁbōyaṁggalavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 37.432 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
